start: Welcome to the VPN bot. Please choose your language.
package_not_available: This package is no longer active. Please choose a package again.
enter_custom_gb: Please enter the custom amount in GB.
invalid_gb: Invalid amount. Allowed range: {min_gb} to {max_gb} GB.
payment_method_prompt:
Your order:
Traffic: {gb} GB
Price: {price} Toman

Choose payment method.
crypto_not_configured: Crypto payment is not configured yet.
crypto_payment_instructions:
USDT TRC20 payment
Traffic: {gb} GB
Price: {price} Toman
Required amount: {usdt} USDT
Rate: {rate} Toman per USDT

Send exactly this amount or more to:
{wallet}

After payment, send the TRON transaction hash here.
invalid_crypto_tx: Invalid transaction hash. Please send the 64-character TRON transaction hash.
crypto_tx_already_used: This transaction hash was already used for another order.
crypto_check_failed:
Could not verify payment: {error}
If the transfer is new, wait a minute and send the hash again.
crypto_order_created: Crypto payment verified and submitted for admin review. Order ID: {order_id}
send_receipt: Please upload the payment receipt image.
receipt_required: Please send only a receipt image.
order_created: Your receipt was submitted for admin review. Order ID: {order_id}
order_rejected: Your order was rejected. Please contact support or upload a correct receipt.
new_receipt_requested: Admin requested a new receipt. Please upload the correct receipt again.
approval_failed: Service activation failed. Support will review it.
service_ready:
Your service is ready.
Purchased: {purchased_gb} GB
Total limit: {total_gb} GB
Used: {used}
Remaining: {remaining}

Subscription link:
{subscription_url}

Configs:
{config_links}

Recommended apps:
Android: v2rayNG
iOS: Streisand / FoXray / V2Box
Windows: v2rayN
macOS: V2Box / Clash Verge
configs_not_available: Use the subscription link to import configs.
no_service: You do not have an active service yet.
no_orders: You have not placed any orders yet.
help_text: To buy or renew, choose a package, transfer the amount manually, and upload your receipt. After admin approval, your service is created or renewed.
support_prompt: Send your support message here. Admin replies will come back through this bot.
support_sent: Your message was sent to support. We will reply here.
support_reply_prompt: Send your reply. It will be delivered by the bot, without showing your Telegram account.
support_reply_failed: Could not send the reply. The user may have blocked the bot.
discount_invalid: This discount code is not valid or has expired.
discount_applied:
Discount applied.
Code: {code}
Discount: {discount} Toman
Final price: {price} Toman

Now upload your receipt for the final amount.
retry_only_failed: Retry is only available for failed orders.
no_active_service_for_completion: No active service found for this order's user.
order_marked_completed: Your order was marked completed by support.
enter_search_query: Enter Telegram ID, Telegram username, Marzban username, or order ID like: order 12.
delete_remote_missing: User was not found in Marzban; local database status was marked deleted.
enter_new_service_gb: Enter GB amount for the new service.
confirm_broadcast:
Confirm sending this message to all users?

{text}
enter_package_price: Send the new total price for {gb}GB.
enter_package_definition:
Send package as: GB PRICE
Example: 20 3000000
cannot_remove_last_package: At least one package must remain active.
enter_discount_definition:
Send discount as: CODE PERCENT AMOUNT_TOMAN MAX_USES
Example: NEW10 10 0 100
Use 0 for percent or amount if needed. MAX_USES is optional.
